speaker: Characters.captain
text: Nothing to be said.

speaker: character
text: Hey, you look like you know your way around a space ship. Interested in an adventure?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Depends on the kind of adventure. Is there money to be made?

speaker: character
text: Do people even care about doing the right thing anymore? But yes, if you play your cards right, you'll be rich in no time.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sounds like my kind of job. Spill it.

speaker: character
text: Troubling news is coming in from the galactic East. Apparently, the three major corporations have opened a new route to the rest of the galaxy, and they're currently entrenching their positions and preparing for war.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: War, huh? I thought they mostly got along just fine.

speaker: character
text: By the sound of it, diplomacy has started breaking down, and it's a mad dash to claim as much territory as possible, displacing the native Darkspace Compact. Here, take this Jumpgate Pass, and go check it out.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Welcome to

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: You've been busy. And about to get even more work on your hands...

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: The major factions have gone to war.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: All three of them? Just like that?

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: They were always at war with eachother, but had to work together to get here so they played friendly.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: But now... no formal declarations. Probably no diplomacy. We were not informed.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Any idea what started it?

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: It has to be Metafiber... but I'm not sure in what capacity.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: But my job is not to speculate. My job is the law. I deal with criminals.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Canisec was meant to keep the peace between them. That was the agreement, but that's out of the airlock.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: So what happens now?

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: My forces will mainly focus on the syndicate, those damn chosen weirdos, and see to the protection of the minor factions.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Well, those that are currently not active in the Conquest sector. Imagine Mindus controlling the entire sector, heh!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Right... and where does that leave independent captains like me?

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Wherever you want to be, Captain.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Hmmph... I know that each of the three major factions is recruiting. They need ships to throw at eachother, and they eat through raw resources.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: So you could speak to them. Hear what they have to say.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: And pick a side?

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: For now. Nothing's permanent in this sector.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: You can align with any of them. Run their missions. Support their bloodlust. Even by attacking the other factions.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Your reputation will take quite a beating, but that's why they set up embassy stations here in the staging sectors.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Go there if you wish to improve your standing with them. The stations are neutral territory.

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: Even the Corsairs have one...

speaker: Characters.canisecConquestCommander
text: But whatever you choose, Captain

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Understood, Commander.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: Captain, you should really improve your standing with us, before we can hire you.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: Captain, we are currently not able to offer you a job position. We are working on retaking a system.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: Ah, Captain. I was hoping we'd meet again.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'm here for the job offer I saw posted.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: Great! Your skills are exactly what we need.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: We would like to offer you a position. We offer really good benefits. Access to our fleets... destroyers...

speaker: Characters.captain
text: What are the working hours? Do I at least get a fancy uniform?

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: You can work from home, or well spaceship. Uniform is optional, but credits and resources come standard.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: By helping us we would gain Fleet Strength, which we can use to push out other factions from surrounding systems.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: This in turn will help you, unlocking those perks I mentioned before...

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Interesting, interesting...

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: There's a jumpgate linking this system to our headquarters in the Conquest sector.

speaker: Characters.stellarRepresentative
text: When you accept, meet up with

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Captain.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Time is credits, Captain. So I'll keep this somewhat short.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Stellar Industries sees the value you bring.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: That goes both ways, faction benefits!

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Definitely, if the results are positive we will both prosper.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Now, to the matter at hand. Our fleets are concentrated along the frontline systems and require constant reinforcement.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Go to the Conquest mission board to generate Fleet Strength. A wide variety of activities are available.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Direct assaults on enemy stations are also encouraged. This will decrease their Fleet Strength. Though your reputation with them will decline.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: The cost of doing business.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Precisely.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: We always play the long-term but for immediate results, we require 10 fleet strength.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll get right on that.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Your recent contributions will improve our frontline positions.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: So I'm a profitable investment?

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: You are yielding acceptable returns.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: Continued improvement will unlock further privileges.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Bigger ships!

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: You can rise further in ranks, but what would really help is you aiding us in owning 30% of the sector.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Well, let me get that sorted for you real quick...

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Captain, I received a seemingly encrypted signal. It shows a message: ".tsoptuo ruo ot tropeR. noitnetta ruoy stseuqer larbmU.".

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: I tried all decryption methods, but I can't make sense of it.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Yes, I see... a very sophisticated encryption.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Pretty sure that would read "Umbral requests your attention. Report to our outpost.".

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: You are a genius! I will mark the location of the outpost on the map.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: With your assistance, we now own over 30% of this sector.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sounds like you're pleased with my performance.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: I do have some feedback, but that can wait.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderStellar
text: We need to hold this momemtum, and keep growing!

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Captain, we may continue supporting Stellar Industries. However, we remain free to assist other factions, including smaller factions.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: There is also a new message we recieved, it's... someone from the Darkspace Compact. You should know him, it's Midas.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: He asks that you meet with him. I've marked the location on your map.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: Captain, this will not stand, improve your standing with us before we can work together.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: Captain, we currently have not presence in the Conquest sector. Return to us when we do.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: Ah, I saw you docking. Thought I'd take a moment to speak with you, Captain.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: We are, and we need abled bodied captains like yourself.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: You could really make a difference, not for profit, but for the people, the collective.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: LOOT?

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: There will be some loot involved.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: Let me return to my script. Ahem... Join us, and you'll be rewarded... with comradeship, solidarity...

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: ... and access to vessels, such as our destroyers...

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: Your actions can tip the balance here, Captain. Help the collective, and you'll have our full support.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: There's a jumpgate linking this system to our headquarters in the Conquest sector.

speaker: Characters.kolyatovCaptain
text: If you would accept, meet up with the

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Ah! Captain! Welcome, welcome!

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Mikhail Kolyatov. Yes... that Kolyatov. My great-great-great-etc-grandfather started the Collective.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Historical records confirm. This is Nikita Kolyatov's offspring.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Ah, yes that was his name.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Anyway. We have situation. Sector is... how you say... contested.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Everyone seems to think they own it.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Exactly! But ownership is outdated concept. Sector should belong to people.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Our fleets push at frontline systems, but we need more strength. Always more strength.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: You help by taking missions in Conquest sector. Build Fleet Strength for us.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: You can also attack enemy stations. They will not like you, but... they do not like us anyway.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Fair point.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: For now, we require 10 Fleet Strength. Small number. Very achievable number.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: You help, yes?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: On it.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Ha,

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Your actions strengthen the morale greatly.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: When collective grow stronger, we all grow stronger. Even you, Captain.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That sounds almost motivational.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Is family tradition.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Continue working with us and you rise in rank.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Large guns!

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: But, now we also need to liberate systems. 30% we need!

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: You can do this, yes?

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Captain, I received a seemingly encrypted signal. It shows a message: ".tsoptuo ruo ot tropeR. noitnetta ruoy stseuqer larbmU.".

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: I tried all decryption methods, but I can't make sense of it.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Yes, I see... a very sophisticated encryption.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Pretty sure that would read "Umbral requests your attention. Report to our outpost.".

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: You are a genius! I will mark the location of the outpost on the map.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Captain! We control over 30% of sector now! This is good day.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You sound surprised.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: No! Not suprised. I always think greatly of you.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: But 30% is not enough. Sector must be... mine.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: The people's?

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Yes, I am also people. You understand spirit of it.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Become better friends with us. More rewards will come. Better ships. Greater trust.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderKolyatov
text: Together we make sector strong.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Captain, we may continue assisting the Kolyatov. However, we remain free to support other factions, including minor factions.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: There is also a new message we recieved, it's... someone from the Darkspace Compact. You should know him, it's Midas.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: He asks that you meet with him. I've marked the location on your map.

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: You are our enemy, improve your standing with us at once!

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: We somehow lost our headquarters. Return when we build another one.

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: The Oracle sensed your arrival, Captain.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Yes, I had to ask for docking clearance.

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: Yes, we are in need of more Drone Power. And, in order to build more drones, we need resources.

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: The Oracle has taken an interest in you.

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: It sees potential. Potential to transcend, to align yourself with the Oracle.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: So, if I help you, I get... spiritual perks? And other benefits, maybe?

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: Perks of the material plane are secondary, such as the ability to purchase our ships. True reward is comprehension... awareness... joining the path of the Oracle.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: I like the secondary perks.

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: Excellent... Consider the gate to our headquarters open.

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: Go through the gate and find our

speaker: Characters.luminateCommander
text: May the Oracle find you.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: Welcome, Captain. I am

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: The Oracle has calculated that this sector must be brought into alignment.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Alignment... meaning control?

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: Control is a crude word. We prefer harmony.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: They mean control.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: Our forces press the frontline. When neighboring systems fail their defense, they will be integrated into the Oracle's network.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: You may assist by running missions within the Conquest sector.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: Direct assaults on enemy stations are also... suggested. Though your reputation with them will deteriorate quickly.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Occupational hazard.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: For now, as a new initiate, can you gather 10 fleet strength for the

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: Your contributions will strengthen our frontline systems.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: With each reinforcement, our probability of successful expansion increases.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'm getting paid to do it, so happy to.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: We seek to control 30% of the sector, aid us in this effort.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Now that's a blessing I understand.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Captain, I received a seemingly encrypted signal. It shows a message: ".tsoptuo ruo ot tropeR. noitnetta ruoy stseuqer larbmU.".

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: I tried all decryption methods, but I can't make sense of it.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Yes, I see... a very sophisticated encryption.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Pretty sure that would read "Umbral requests your attention. Report to our outpost."

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: You are a genius! I will mark the location of the outpost on the map.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: With your assistance, over 30% of this sector now resonates with the Combine.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Resonates. I assume that means we're winning...

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: Winning... is temporary. We are seeking to enlight the enemy.

speaker: Characters.conquestCommanderLuminate
text: Climb further within our ranks, Captain. Greater rewards, such as a deeper understanding, await you.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Captain, we may continue assisting the Luminate. However, we remain free to support any faction we choose. Perhaps we should evaluate the minor factions as well.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: There is however a new message we recieved, it's... someone from the Darkspace Compact, you should know him, Midas.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: He asks that you meet with him. I've marked the location on your map.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'm not sure I have the right spacestation, I'm looking for escort services?

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: You mean mercenaries?

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Let me guess, you spoke to Brenda? We recruited her from... she's new!

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: A good employee... we have been receiving a lot more traffic since she began, not that many new clients though... they left dissapointed.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: But you... you seem in need of a mercenary!

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: We have them in all sizes, the higher your reputation with us the larger the ships we offer.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Looking for some more hull to intimidate your enemies? We have those plenty.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Looking for more of an industrial approach? We have mining and salvage captains available, some flown by real Steel Vultures, truly!

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Don't worry, our agents will try not to steal any loot that belongs to you!

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Slight worry detected.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Now, just for some more information as to what our agents can expect.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Have you flown in formation before?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: No.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Do you intend to stay within Canisec controlled space?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: No.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Ok, ok, ok, let's see... will you purposely seek out hostile territories?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Yes.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Ok, ok... just a silly question this one, really... but we have to ask... Will you be engaging in piracy?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Possibly.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Right... You have been registered under our highest premium tier! Congratulations.

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: The Recruitment Center found in all Omnitac Agency stations will list the available agents. Happy...

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Happy ending?

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: What? No! Happy browsing!

speaker: Characters.mercenaryEmbassyIntroduction
text: Omnitac protects.

speaker: character
text: Welcome to Mindus Holdings. Sorry for the mess, we're still trying to get our operations up and running here.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: So I hear there's a big war going on. Is Mindus trying to break in to the conflict as well?

speaker: character
text: Yes. With the faction struggle going on in the Ara Martis, Mindus is looking to exploit the area's natural resources for our own gain. Even without directly engaging with the other combatants, we should be able to carve out an area to conduct our operations.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sweet, what can I do to help?

speaker: character
text: Complete missions from the mission board here in the Embassy. Once we have gathered enough fleet strength, we will be able to make a concerted push into the Ara Martis and establish a headquarters there.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: On it!

speaker: character
text: Welcome back to Mindus Holdings. Sorry for the mess, I've been too busy managing fleet logistics to tidy up.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Glad to see my efforts are paying off. Is the fleet ready?

speaker: character
text: Yes, everyone is accounted for and our target is selected. We're just waiting for your signal to kick off the entire operation.

speaker: character
text: Welcome back to Mindus Holdings. The fleet is still waiting for your response.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Is everything ready?

speaker: character
text: Yes, at your command we will invade the Ara Martis and claim control over our new headquarters. From there, we will begin to expand our influence. Just say the word.

speaker: character
text: Hey hey. Did ya hear about the war going on next door?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Well, yes. It's a bit hard to miss these days. What about it?

speaker: character
text: Ok, here's the deal. War means... salvage! And salvage means profit for the Steel Vultures! Right now we're just sending out small expeditions to salvage whatever they can get their hands on, but with your help we'll be able to build up a fleet and claim a piece of the Ara Martis for ourselves!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sounds like I'll be able to profit off this deal as well. What's the plan?

speaker: character
text: Complete missions from the mission board here in the Embassy. Once we have gathered enough fleet strength, we will be able to make a concerted push into the Ara Martis and establish a headquarters there.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: On it!

speaker: character
text: Hey hey. Did ya hear? The fleet is assembled and ready to go!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Glad to see my hard work is paying off. All the preparations have been made?

speaker: character
text: Yes, everyone is ready and our target is set. The Ara Martis and all of its salvage will be ours! Just say the word, and we'll begin our invasion.

speaker: character
text: Hey hey. Ready to start the invasion yet?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Are all the fleet captains ready?

speaker: character
text: Ready and waiting. Everyone's waiting on your signal to start the invasion. How about it?

speaker: character
text: Yarr, matey. Are ye ready to become a real pirate?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Excuse me? Why are you talking like that?

speaker: character
text: Sorry, just trying to make the experience more immersive. But if you're looking to align yourself with us Corsairs, I might be able to unlock a few juicy rewards for you.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sweet, what can I do?

speaker: character
text: Complete some missions in this here embassy, and we'll be able to gather up enough fleet strength to make a push into the Ara Martis and establish a headquarters there. Loot and eternal glory awaits! Yarrr!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Yarr.

speaker: character
text: Ho there, landlubber. How fares the fleet?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: By the looks of it, you should have enough strength to break through the blockade and establish your base of operations.

speaker: character
text: And it will be a moment to be remembered! On your signal, we will begin the assault. Just say the word, matey!

speaker: character
text: Ho there, landlubber. The fleet is still waiting for your approval. Did you finish your preparations?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Is everyone ready?

speaker: character
text: We are all waiting for your signal to begin the assault. A glorious victory awaits!

speaker: character
text: Welcome, friend. The Stranded are glad to receive you in our humble Embassy.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I hear there's a war going on. Are the Stranded planning to participate as well?

speaker: character
text: Unfortunately, we lack the means of funding such an expedition, as well as the necessary fleet strength. However...

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Go on.

speaker: character
text: Say, someone was to start doing some missions for the Embassy. Perhaps those missions were to generate enough fleet strength to build up a force capable of breaking into the Ara Martis. Well... that could change the course of the Stranded.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Interesting! I'll let you know if I come across someone like that.

speaker: character
text: Welcome, friend. The most curious thing happened. We suddenly find ourselves with a powerful fleet! All thanks to a kindly anonymous benefactor.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Oh. Yes, well, I wouldn't know anything about that, surely.

speaker: character
text: But on such a fortuitous occasion, we should start off the fleet offensive with a ceremonious order to battle. Please, will you do the honors?

speaker: character
text: Welcome, friend. The fleets are ready, thanks to our benefactor. We are waiting for you to signal the attack.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Do you really want me to take charge of the fleet?

speaker: character
text: No, your role is purely ceremonial. Just give the word, and the fleet will find its own way into the Ara Martis to establish our headquarters.

speaker: character
text: Welcome back, recruit. System tells me you completed your patrol, well done!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Man, those pirates weren't kidding. Almost like they were trying to kill me!

speaker: character
text: Nobody said this would be easy. Luckily for you, that's why the rewards are quite substantial.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks! That almost makes all this hassle worth it.

speaker: character
text: That's what you say now. Soon, you'll be back here day after day, measuring yourself against the most hardy foes this Galaxy has to offer.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Great, I can't wait...

speaker: character
text: How's your patrol coming along, recruit?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Welcome to Canisec, your most trustworthy defense partner in the Galaxy. What can I do for you?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Hey, I heard you were recruiting contractors to conduct patrols of the sector. What's that all about?

speaker: character
text: Simple, you go to any point of interest that we post on the patrol board, and eliminate any hostile forces that you encounter. Then you collect your reward, rinse, and repeat. Interested?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sure, sign me up!

speaker: character
text: Excellent. We do have a one-time sign up bonus for new recruits, so check out our offer in your mission log. See you back soon!

speaker: character
text: You did it! One less piece of pirate scum polluting our galaxy.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That was quite the challenge! Pirates sure aren't messing around in these parts. Now where's my reward?

speaker: character
text: Here you go, well deserved. Get some rest, and come back any time you're in the mood for more pirate hunting!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks!

speaker: character
text: Hey, how's your hunt coming along?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Hey, big shot. You look ready for a real challenge.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You're talking to me?

speaker: character
text: Of course! I can spot a real pirate hunter from miles away. And you're in luck, there's plenty of pirate scum for all of us to fight in this sector.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Pirates do seem to be popping up all over the place. Was it always this bad? And what did they do to deserve this treatment?

speaker: character
text: Bah, irrelevant. All you need to know is that there's a bounty on their head, and they probably did something to deserve that. Less talking, more hunting. And there's a big reward in it for you.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Now you're talking my language!

speaker: character
text: Well, that took you long enough. After you left I had a shower, read the news while enjoying two coffees and juggled my goldfish for a bit of fun. And then I traveled this way as well. Just to prove a point, I guess.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Ehhh, how...? Are the goldfish ok?

speaker: character
text: Fast Lane travel, my friend. You have to see it to believe it. And yeah, they're fine.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Very impressive, how does it work?

speaker: character
text: Well, you pick up the aquarium, and... Oh wait, you mean the travel.

speaker: character
text: The technical details are secret. But, for your effort, we'll give you exclusive access. Happy jumping!

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Upgrade installed, Captain. Oh wow...

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Ok cool, thanks. I guess we'll go try it right now.

speaker: character
text: Hey, still here? Those goods don't transport themselves you know.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Indeed, that is usually how it works.

speaker: character
text: Oh hey, you looking for work?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Well that depends, what kind of work?

speaker: character
text: Just a little bit of trading, with a very interesting reward if I say so myself.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Ok, sounds compelling, tell me more!

speaker: character
text: Let's not spoil it right away shall we? Let's just say that Intertrade Network has access some special Jump Gate tech.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Jump Gate tech you say? Ok I'm in.

speaker: character
text: Great, deliver the goods to the indicated space station and we'll see about that reward.

speaker: character
text: You are back! I have prepared everything!

speaker: character
text: Did they look at you funny? Walking away with these items?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Well, I think it just got transported to my ship, so I didn't see anyone.

speaker: character
text: Yes, but what would your crew think of you hah!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Well, they know we are doing this for you, so...

speaker: character
text: Yes, well sure... fine... payment time, the agreed upon amount.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: The amount being one, and payment being you upgrading my learning implant?

speaker: character
text: Yes, yes! I will do this now.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Go ahead... Should I lie down?

speaker: character
text: No... hmmm...

speaker: character
text: Done! Humans are just so easy to work with.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That... ok, I feel like I could have done that.

speaker: character
text: Probably, very easy... Now, please... Go! I will work on my project, yes!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thank you, I hope you succeed... I think?

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Oh what are wonderful person.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I would not say that, but I'm happy my learning implant got upgraded.

speaker: character
text: What? I was not doing anything.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I, just... where do I get these items again?

speaker: character
text: In-ter-trade! When you land, find one of their Trade Terminals and procure the items.

speaker: character
text: Yes! Oh look at you. Hey there...

speaker: character
text: Poor Captain, hello? Hello! How are you?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Uh... Hello? I... am fine.

speaker: character
text: It... You... Oh, you I can fix!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I need fixing?

speaker: character
text: You poor... Yes! Upgrading you need!

speaker: character
text: I will enhance your learning capabilities.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: For free?

speaker: character
text: Oh you stupi... yes! No! No not for free. But not that costly either.

speaker: character
text: You see, I am working on a little side project.

speaker: character
text: Just some android tinkering, nothing illegal, no!

speaker: character
text: It's just that I have run out of supplies.

speaker: character
text: I need several more Artificial Organs, some packs of Synthblood and another Blank Android Shell.

speaker: character
text: But... I am banned from Intertrade. You understand, right?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'm not banned, so no?

speaker: character
text: See! Great, you can bring me these items.

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Captain, why not help this noble and great doctor?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You are on his side? Wait... what do you think he's doing here?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Alright

speaker: character
text: Ah! So exciting! Yes, I go prepare.

speaker: character
text: No, you go away.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Can I come back later?

speaker: character
text: You need a bit more experience for me to take interest in you.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: So, it seems I was not paying attention, where do I go again?

speaker: character
text: The Omnitac Space Station. I send the map marker to your info panel.

speaker: character
text: Greetings Captain.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Well met. I haven't seen your insignia, which faction are you aligned to?

speaker: character
text: Aligned to none, aligned to all one could say.

speaker: character
text: We just need to right incentives... cold hard digital credits...

speaker: Characters.shipAi
text: Ah, Mercs!

speaker: character
text: You shut your mou... your voice apparatus.. no! Bad robot!

speaker: character
text: Omnitac Agency is an esteemed escort service!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I... sure... am confused. I am interested.

speaker: character
text: We offer a wide variety of different personnel.

speaker: character
text: We have set up several operations across the frontier, but we have a Space Station relatively closeby.

speaker: character
text: Meet up with an associate of mine, they will be able to assist you further.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Heading over there now!

speaker: character
text: Omnitac protects.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That's good to know. Protection is important.

speaker: character
text: Hey, look who's back with a fat stack of cash. Ready to get started?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You bet!

speaker: character
text: Alright, let me just flick this switch here, and... done!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Huh, I don't feel any smarter.

speaker: character
text: You seem like a hard-working fellow. Interested in doing some surveying work for us? Mindus will make it worth your time.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sure, I'm always up for a challenge.

speaker: character
text: Ready to enroll in Mindus Academy yet?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Hey, welcome to Mindus, the galaxy's foremost asteroid mining corporation. What can I do for you?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I was looking to specialize further into asteroid mining, any way you can help me out?

speaker: character
text: Sure thing, but you'll have to show me your skills first. Go out there and collect some ore, then we can talk. Oh, and don't forget about the application fee.

speaker: character
text: Wow, what's all that dust on your uniform? Looks like you'll make a proper miner after all!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Please... No more...

speaker: character
text: Don't worry, you can get back to relaxing after this. Here's your reward.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks!

speaker: character
text: How's that survey coming along?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Hey, you look like you know a thing or two about asteroid mining. How about you do some work for us?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Why do I feel this 'work' is going to be the end of me?

speaker: character
text: Don't worry about it. We're conducting a survey of the area. You won't even have to go out of your way for it, just log the types and quantities of asteroid ore you collect.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: Unbelievable. Even a pathetic creature like you can follow orders.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Ugh, can we skip the insults?

speaker: character
text: But insulting the new recruits is the only entertainment I get these days! Anyway, here's your contractor license.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Excellent, that should help me get an upper hand over my enemies.

speaker: character
text: Now that you're one of us, how about some friendly competition? There are plenty of pirates all throughout the sector, let's see if you can top the leaderboards!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Challenge accepted!

speaker: character
text: Have you completed your assignment, worm?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Unbelievable. Is this the quality of new recruits these days?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'm sorry?

speaker: character
text: Yeah, you better be. You just set foot onto a bastion of Orsanon Security, but you look like you sauntered into a supermarket. Shape up, recruit!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Err, sure. Nice to meet you too.

speaker: character
text: You want combat training? Prove to me that you're not some lowly worm-creature first. There's some autonomous drones flying around in this system. Destroy them, then return to me, along with your application fee.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Combat training does sound like a good idea...

speaker: character
text: I can't believe it. Looks like we've got a new chief pirate hunter!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Please tell me there's a reward for all that work.

speaker: character
text: Good job, recruit. You've earned this skill point fair and square.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks!

speaker: character
text: How's the pirate hunt going?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: You look like you've fired a few guns in your time. How about some friendly competition?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Why do I feel like I'm being roped into some kind of scheme?

speaker: character
text: Orsanon Security is keeping leaderboards for pirate eliminations. Sign up, and you may even win a prize!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: Hey, you're back! How did your scrap hunt go?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Does any of this rusted metal look valuable to you?

speaker: character
text: No, but I'm just the middleman. Some scientist-looking folks go crazy for the stuff.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: So, can you teach me about salvaging now?

speaker: character
text: Of course, as promised. Oops, did I forget to mention the training fee?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: This training better be worth it. I worked hard for those credits, you know.

speaker: character
text: Now that you know a thing or two about salvaging, why not spread the word of your new best friends, the Steel Vultures? If folks see a charmer like you at work in a salvage field, they'll surely come around to us.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That sounds like a lot of work, I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: Hey, sugar! How's that salvage coming along?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: You're brave. You actually decided to disembark on board a Steel Vultures station. For all you know, my people could be scrapping your ride right now.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I doubt it, that'd be bad for business.

speaker: character
text: Haha, too true! You're all right. A lot of people have some strange hangups when it comes to salvaging. Mostly we just take stuff that was already abandoned. Mostly.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Huh, so even old abandoned rust can still be valuable?

speaker: character
text: You bet! And to prove it, here's coordinates to an ancient wreckage floating about in this system. Go extract some of its components, and in return I'll teach you about salvaging.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: On it!

speaker: character
text: Wow, you actually did it! Good job collecting all that salvage, couldn't have been easy.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Please tell me there's a reward for all that work.

speaker: character
text: Good job, recruit. You've earned this skill point fair and square.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks!

speaker: character
text: Heya! Salvage anything good lately?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Hey, sweetie! When was the last time you ever had a salvage laser bite into a derelict wreck?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: What's with this strange pickup line?

speaker: character
text: Just kidding. But as you know, this sector is full of scrap ripe for the picking. Prove that you're a reliable salvager, and the Steel Vultures will scrounge up some rewards for ya.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: I don't believe it, the rookie actually managed to throw some plates together. Not bad!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: All I did was program the automated systems, though.

speaker: character
text: Shush, don't tell anyone! If the rabble knew what that forge was capable of, I'd be out of a job!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: So, can you teach me about advanced industrial processes now?

speaker: character
text: Of course, as promised. Here ya go, kid. I hope this knowledge serves you well.

speaker: character
text: Now that you're a bona fide expert, how about you hone your skills some more? The shops around here are always looking for more refined materials, and you might even make something useful for yourself.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That sounds like a lot of work, I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: You done at the forge yet?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: I don't believe it. You want to know what it's like to be a Forgemaster? You, with those flabby arms? I doubt you've ever even held a hammer before!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: As if modern manufacturing techniques even involve hammers.

speaker: character
text: Har har! You're all right, kid. Say, if you want to learn more about industrial processes, I do have some time to take on a new student. Interested?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Judging by that glint in your eye, you're not just going to tell me what I want to know.

speaker: character
text: Damn straight! Show me what you're capable of first. Then, for the right amount of credits, I might teach you a thing or two...

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll get to work.

speaker: character
text: I don't believe it. You actually did all that? I didn't think you outsiders were actually capable of doing work.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Believe me, it wasn't easy. I think a reward is in order.

speaker: character
text: Of course. From now on, you may officially call yourself my apprentice! Please bow in gratitude.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks, I guess...

speaker: character
text: How's the forge treating you?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Have I seen you around here before?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Depends, am I in trouble? Did anything expensive break?

speaker: character
text: You just have that look about you. Like you belong at the forge controls. Say, why don't you do some crafting here? We can always use some extra hands.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: Good to see you, initiate. I see you have taken to the life of a Drone whisperer.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Erm, yeah, sure. Drones are great and all that.

speaker: character
text: Wonderful news. Now, as soon as you make your donation to the Combine, we can begin.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Is this going to take long?

speaker: character
text: It is already done.

speaker: character
text: Now, show the galaxy how a true Drone master operates. Once you have ascended and become one with your Drones, meet me back here, and I will reward you.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Why does it sound like I've just joined a cult?

speaker: character
text: Greetings, initiate. Are you ready to be anointed?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Machine's blessings upon you, stranger. Have you received the word of the Oracle yet?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Umm, no. I don't think so.

speaker: character
text: How unfortunate. Our blessed Oracle has deemed you worthy of receiving training in the art of Drone control.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Drones, huh? That does sound interesting. Sign me up!

speaker: character
text: One moment, please. You will first have to demonstrate ownership of a Drone-capable space craft. And, of course, your tithe to the Luminate Combine is required.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll get to work.

speaker: character
text: Marvelous work, brother. The number of devotees to this temple has tripled since your arrival!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Hell yeah. Of course, that's all thanks to me.

speaker: character
text: The Luminate Combine will forever be in your debt. Here, take this.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You're very welcome.

speaker: character
text: Greetings, brother. How are your Drones feeling today?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: They are, uh, doing just fine. I guess.

speaker: character
text: Welcome, brother. Do you seek to join the Oracle in prayer?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: No, actually, I heard you're looking for drone pilots.

speaker: character
text: Ah, yes. Show everyone the magnificence of a drone-based loadout, and we'll reward you.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll get on it.

speaker: character
text: Welcome back, I heard that ship managed to make it back to station. The captain was very grateful for his rescue.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: No problem. At least, as long as you hold up your end of the deal.

speaker: character
text: Canisec always keeps its word. Here, I've granted you access to our Defense resources.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks!

speaker: character
text: Damn those pirates. I wish someone would just show those bastards that we'll never give up the fight. Show that Canisec and the rest of the galaxy will never yield to their threat.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That sounds dangerous, I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: Hey, did you meet with the damaged ship?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Hi, welcome to the Canisec Defense Academy. Sorry for the lack of fanfare, we're kind of all hands on deck today.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: What's going on?

speaker: character
text: A big pirate raid disrupted most of the system, and we're still dealing with the fallout. We'd be grateful if you could help out.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sure, tell me what to do.

speaker: character
text: Buy a Shield Pylon from the general shop and meet one of the ships that was raided. They're a sitting duck out there. In exchange, I'll give you a discount on our standard enrollment fee.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sign me up!

speaker: character
text: Unbelievable, every pirate we've interrogated lately has told legends of your unyielding battle tactics.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: No mercy for lawless scum.

speaker: character
text: Here's your reward, it's more than deserved. Thanks for defending the sector.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Anything for you.

speaker: character
text: Hey, meet with any pirates lately?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Just the usual.

speaker: character
text: Did you hear? Pirates raided another base in the system. They must think we're a joke.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sounds like something needs to be done.

speaker: character
text: I wish someone would just show those bastards that we'll never give up the fight. Show that Canisec and the rest of the galaxy will never yield to their threat.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: That sounds dangerous, I'll think about it.

speaker: character
text: Well I'll be damned, you actually managed to save up some money. Did you have to starve yourself? Go without fuel for months?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Actually, it was easy. Even without your snooty high-class lady charm I was able to do this much. I'm beginning to doubt if I need your lessons at all.

speaker: character
text: Oh, you have guts! I like you. Here, as promised, my 100-part video course on day trading.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks!

speaker: character
text: Now, if you're up for a challenge... there's an ongoing contest here at Intertrade, where the one who makes the most money using the Trade Terminal gets a big fat bonus. Interested?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You had me at bonus. Sign me up!

speaker: character
text: Oh, the pauper is back. How's your first million credits coming along?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Working on it.

speaker: character
text: Out of my way, peasant. My important business waits for no one.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Excuse me? I can trade here, just like everybody else.

speaker: character
text: You? A trader? please, don't make me laugh. I doubt you even know what a million-credit bill looks like in person.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Oh yeah? Well, I'll prove you wrong! I can buy high and sell low like the best of them!

speaker: character
text: Fine, fine. Have it your way. If you show me a million credits in your possession, I might be willing to teach you a thing or two about the real economy that keeps this galaxy afloat. After paying my modest coaching fee, of course.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'll hold you to that!

speaker: character
text: Wow, I just checked the leaderboard. Looks like you won this round of the Intertrade Challenge! Congratulations!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Of course, it was all skill. No luck or gambling involved.

speaker: character
text: The Trade Master has tasked me with handing out your reward. Here you go, well deserved.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Thanks!

speaker: character
text: Back already? I'm not seeing your name atop the leaderboard just yet. How's your trading career coming along?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: I'm working on it.

speaker: character
text: Greetings, trader. Are you here to take on the Intertrade Challenge?.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: What's that?

speaker: character
text: Well... Okay, I'll tell you, even though we're competitors now. There's an ongoing contest here at Intertrade, where the one who makes the most money using the Trade Terminal gets a big fat bonus. Interested?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You had me at bonus. Sign me up!

speaker: character
text: Heya, heard you're looking for crew?

speaker: Characters.captain
text: You bet!

speaker: character
text: Hi, you're just the enterprising kind of captain I'm looking for!

speaker: character
text: Interested in a once-in-a-lifetime chance to invest in future production of space ships? Right now they're just drawings on paper, but imagine the money you'll save by getting in early!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Wow, that sounds like an amazing deal!

speaker: character
text: Hi there! Are you by any chance interested in new equipment? As a fully qualified representative for

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sure, I'll take a look.

speaker: character
text: Hey, looking for some prime quality scrap to salvage? I found the remnants of an ancient space battle, ready to be picked apart. For the right price I'll send you the coordinates.

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Hmm, that does sound interesting.

speaker: character
text: Hey, did ya hear? A rogue asteroid has appeared in the system recently. Word on the street is, it's the motherlode! Interested in the location of this

speaker: Characters.captain
text: Sure, let me see what you have.

speaker: shipAi
text: We have made it, captain!

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, we're receiving a hail.

speaker: captain
text: ECHO, put it through.

speaker: umbralContact
text: Captain

speaker: umbralContact
text: This channel isn't secure... come to the rally point.

speaker: shipAi
text: This seems to be our contact profile, Captain. I've marked the Rally Point on your map.

speaker: captain
text: Understood, thank you ECHO.

speaker: umbralContact
text: Captain, I've been waiting for quite a bit.

speaker: captain
text: I... got here as fast as I could. Who am I communicating with?

speaker: umbralContact
text: ...Have you made contact with any of the others?

speaker: captain
text: No, I haven't seen anyone since before the jump. I got thrown off course and ended up in a closed sector.

speaker: umbralContact
text: I should have known it wouldn't go flawlessly... quite a botched operation already. But... we'll still make use of you.

speaker: umbralContact
text: I'll contact you when we know more.

speaker: umbralContact
text: In the meantime, get acquainted with your surrounding systems. Maybe do a job or two. It's quite peaceful around there... if you ignore the outlaws.

speaker: umbralContact
text: If you need the items in the containers, take them.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, we can install new hardware at the Personal Hangar in any spacestation.

speaker: umbralContact
text: Captain, urgent news.

speaker: umbralContact
text: One of your expedition members has been captured by the

speaker: umbralContact
text: Find him and get him out. He's carrying critical information I need.

speaker: umbralContact
text: The location of the

speaker: luminateCommander
text: Welcome to

speaker: luminateCommander
text: I'm

speaker: luminateCommander
text: We've already encountered two others of your kind.

speaker: captain
text: Our kind?

speaker: luminateCommander
text: Disruptors...

speaker: captain
text: I... don't know how to respond to that. Are they nearby? Can I speak to them?

speaker: luminateCommander
text: They broke several laws. One escaped. The other is in custody.

speaker: luminateCommander
text: So no, you cannot speak to them.

speaker: captain
text: Laws? I'm sure they weren't that bad... Our group suffered a major jump malfunction. Ending up here wasn't their intention.

speaker: luminateCommander
text: ... I might be willing to release him, if your reputation with us were higher...

speaker: luminateCommander
text: This is all I can offer.

speaker: luminateCommander
text: May the oracle find you.

speaker: captain
text: ... And you?

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, I've scanned the system and found a prison outpost, the only one within range.

speaker: captain
text: Great, let's go break him out...

speaker: shipAi
text: ... Or we could improve relations with the

speaker: luminateCommander
text: No need to apologize, Captain. You did us a favor.

speaker: luminateCommander
text: We will release your companion, we have been holding him here.

speaker: luminateCommander
text: Untill next time, Captain.

speaker: luminateCommander
text: May the oracle find you.

speaker: captain
text: Thank you?
