speaker: realUmbralContact
text: This is where we need you.

speaker: captain
text: Of course.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: The stations within the Conquest Sector were assembled rather crudely. Little attention was given to security.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Their software are not getting any security updates.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: That is where we found our in.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: I will provide you with a specialized infiltration tool. A hacking tool if you will.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Use this on any friendly station within the Conquest Sector.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: It will infect their systems... and persist, even if they attempt repairs or complete reconstruction.

speaker: shipAi
text: How?

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: How? Probably the cloud, I don't know... Not that important.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: It's all safe for you. You will not suffer any reputation loss with the station you choose, should really only be benefitial.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Once successful, I will make contact.

speaker: captain
text: On it!

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Checking signal...

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: One second.. checking...

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: All clear. None the wiser.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Let's see... yes...

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Alright, we have set up the Umbral Reach board, there you will be able to find a mission which will infect their systems further.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Once we reach full infection in the station, we will seek contact again.

speaker: shipAi
text: Oh! A new button Captain, let's press it.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Systems are... fully infected...

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: That was a lot quicker then anticipated..

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Head back to the outpost, as I heard Stella has arrived there from the Frontier.

speaker: captain
text: Is there a passphrase?

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: No.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: She will be your liason going forward.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: And she will make a fine agent out of you yet.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Captain

speaker: captain
text: No.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: No... Ok? Sure... I'm fine thank you.

speaker: captain
text: Stella? You changed.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: I have to fit my new role, you understand.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: I have been tasked overseeing your efforts in this new sector.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: We don't need to take over by force, if we can just control the opposition.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: But sometimes... force is required, the destruction of the enemy! Eliminate them! Vaporize them! Shred them down to their beams!

speaker: shipAi
text: Other then that, are you alright?

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: ... yes... We discovered some wannabe spies closeby, surely trying to gather intel on our new presence here.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Deal with them.

speaker: captain
text: Yes ma'am.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Right, I forgot... make sure you bring one of those Decoy Transponders with you from the shop, if you value your reputation with whoever you will encounter.

speaker: shipAi
text: Interesting. Captain, the spoofed transponder signature will persist only until your next station docking.

speaker: captain
text: We eliminated them, Stella. They were mercenaries of the Omnitac Agency.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: I knew it!

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: It was the Omnitac Agency all along!

speaker: shipAi
text: An esteemed escort service would probably not operate without someone hiring them.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Right, good point.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: This does not help us any further, we are dealing with someone trying to cover their warp signature.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: We'll have to let our agents infiltrate further and gather information.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: In the meantime, your task is to infect more stations.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Check out the shop if you need more hacking tools.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Return to me once you have reach the target.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, hacking other stations will work the same as you did with the first station, but the conquest station you are trying to infect has to be adjecent to an already infected station's system.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Our reach is expanding, Captain.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Keep up the good work.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Stella is waiting for you at the outpost. Report to her at once.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Captain

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Let's get right to it. We don't know anything about who hired the Omnitac mercs, yet.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: What we did discover is the location of several research facilities.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: One for each of the major factions. They are, like us, experimenting on Metafiber.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: We need their data slates, it would speed up our research by quite a bit.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Expect resistance, it should be heavily guarded.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: But, all we need are the data slates, which are most likely in the Core part of the station.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: I could be an quick and easy snatch job, acquire them however you see fit.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Return them to me after acquiring them.

speaker: shipAi
text: Just a friendly reminder captain, Decoy Transponders are available in the Umbral Shops.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: These are valuable. I'll send them to our research station at once.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: There are not many tasks I can give you, other than the task of further expanding our influence.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Get back to me once more stations have been infected.

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Captain, you are going at a great pace!

speaker: captain
text: Can't you hire more personnel? I feel like I'm carrying this team, and I'm the only one in this team.

speaker: shipAi
text: Hey! Rude...

speaker: realUmbralContact
text: Report to Stella at once.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Captain.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: We have located another Metafiber Data Slate, or at least know of it.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Our agents gathered it will be transported soon.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: By a Void Drifter ship.

speaker: captain
text: I thought you were allies with them?

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Allies? With all of them? Do you know how much that would cost?

speaker: captain
text: Probably a lot of commendations!

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Yes, you would need special Void Drifter Commendations, and those do not exist, thank the oracle.

speaker: captain
text: The oracle?

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: It's just a saying...

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Ahem... so, let's get back to the mission.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Our agents have placed a tracker on the ship, so we know where it is.

speaker: captain
text: Tracker?

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Yes, to track ships? How else will you covertly steal their cargo? They are available in most Umbral Shops. Pairs great with Cargo Scanners.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: But this ship has already been tagged. Go to the location, and eliminate the ship.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Bring back the data, Captain.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Thank you for delivering the slate, good job as always.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: I'll send it off to get experimented upon.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: This should be the missing piece, we have everything we need.

speaker: captain
text: What are you trying to achieve, anyways?

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: That would be not for me to spill, Captain...

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Let's distract you with a reward.

speaker: captain
text: I am distracted.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: There is something waiting for you in your hangar.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: It's an old design. A stripped down Eclipse, high travel speed, decent turrets but... somewhat lower protection values.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Even has a small dronebay. You know, for drones.

speaker: umbralReachStella
text: Get back to infecting stations, Captain.

speaker: captain
text: First, I'm checking out the hangar!

speaker: shipAi
text: We will have to wait for a game update to progress this mission, Captain.

speaker: captain
text: Stella?

speaker: character
text: Ah!! You startled me. Don't sneak up on me like that.

speaker: captain
text: Isn't that what I'm supposed to do, being all sneaky like?

speaker: character
text: Yes, but don't try it out on me! Get going!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Captain!

speaker: captain
text: Midas? Nice ship.

speaker: shipAi
text: It is a Terravex-class Destroyer, captain. Shiny!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Thank you. As you may have spotted, Meridia has upped its efforts, expanding further and further.

speaker: captain
text: Yes yes, I need to halt their expansion, and I will get rewarded. Right?

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Correct.

speaker: captain
text: Good enough for me.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Even if they don't hold any territory, these filths endlessly try to gather more souls for their overlord.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: We will send you on a small campaign, disrupting them the best we can.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: So... your task... we know where some prominent political figures are being transported. If we can terminate them, we deal a great blow to their propaganda machine.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: They will be traveling to an outpost. Destroy it! Their departure point is logged at the station they are inbound from.

speaker: captain
text: Will I be getting assistance?

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: I'll see what forces I can spare. But you seem quite capable.

speaker: shipAi
text: Always the same story.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Oh, just so you know... your reputation with the Compact here is not important to me. I'd rather you fix it, but my task is the protection of the core systems from the threat out of Meridia.

speaker: captain
text: Yes, well... sorry about that.

speaker: shipAi
text: Not really sorry.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: That's it! Freeze in the nothingness you cowards!

speaker: shipAi
text: Wraaaaaaah!

speaker: captain
text: What? Yes!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Good job, now get over to the next location and continue your crusade!

speaker: captain
text: I feel like it's more your crusade... but yes, on it!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Finally! The damage those monsters would've done would be immense.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: It dropped some of their discs as well.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: I suggest not viewing the discs, just sell them at an Intertrade Trade Terminal.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: We want to eliminate more figures within their hierarchy.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: If you could draw them out, by let's say sabotaging their economy... their mining and salvage operations...

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: ... that would garner attention from some more elite forces, and dealing with them would hurt their morale quite a bit.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: I've marked the location of a mining operation on your map. Your first target. Eliminate the miners.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Could be a quick hit and run, but they could send reinforcements.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, amongst the loot I also scanned a beacon... handy, in this situation.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Good. The miners have been dealt with.

speaker: shipAi
text: Easy targets. Just how I like them.

speaker: captain
text: Hey, that's my line!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Right.. next up is a salvaging operation, same idea.

speaker: captain
text: No explanation needed, going there right away! Let me check the map first... what?! All the way over there...

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Yes!

speaker: captain
text: Easy targets. Just how I like them.

speaker: shipAi
text: Hey, that's my line!

speaker: captain
text: No it's not, I'll talk to you later about it ECHO!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: I... ok... Well, I've picked up a signal that the Meridia commanders have been deployed.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: My forces have managed to put trackers on them. Very convenient for you, Captain.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: A slight warning, these are not ordinary captains, so be prepared for quite a fight.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: We've marked the location on your map as to where they can be intercepted.

speaker: captain
text: Got it, we'll go in prepared.

speaker: shipAi
text: Or not, we'll wing it.

speaker: captain
text: ECHO!!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Let me guess... Easy targets. Just how you like them?

speaker: captain
text: They were definitely not easy!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: I'm joking... this is quite the accomplishment. With them gone, it will bring internal chaos. Even more than is standard for them.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: You have helped us out greatly.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: I have another request, and it is a big one... it's something which needs to happen before we can proceed further towards Meridia.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: But let's take a breather... you do seem to be entitled to a reward, at this stage.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: We can't give it to you completely for free, so let's make it a trade.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: We need certain materials. Bring them to the Darkspace Embassy.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Here's the gate pass to our embassy sector.

speaker: captain
text: But what are we trading for? Just materials?

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: No, and a ship of course!

speaker: shipAi
text: Exciting! Captain, Intertrade stations have missions that exchange materials, in case we're missing something specific.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Material transfer completed. Have fun, Captain! You'll find the ship in your hangar.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: You'll need to install modules and turrets for the coming fight, or well... fights.

speaker: captain
text: Yes, we need to calibrate the targeting of the new ship.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: We will entrust you with the following objective: eliminate Meridia from the conquest sector.

speaker: captain
text: Well, that is quite a bit of calibrating...

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: You have done it, Captain.

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: It's something which none of us could achieve, but you are a different breed. Not NPC's like us.

speaker: captain
text: Don't say that! ECHO is an NPC and did most of the work!

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: Non Powerful Captain, I meant. What are you on about?

speaker: darkspaceSmuggler1
text: ... give me some time to come up with a new task for you.

speaker: shipAi
text: We will have to wait for a game update to progress this mission, Captain.

speaker: captain
text: Midas!

speaker: character
text: Not right now Captain, I'm busy.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain!

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain

speaker: captain
text: What in the...

speaker: shipAi
text: Hull integrity is compromised. Several systems are offline. My AI core has sustained damage.

speaker: shipAi
text: Repairs will require external support, preferably a station.

speaker: shipAi
text: You don't look too good either. Your learning implant seems to be... reset.

speaker: shipAi
text: And to top it off, we've lost the cargo... including all the Plasma Cells we had.

speaker: captain
text: Well... What about navigation? Can we set a course?

speaker: shipAi
text: Negative. Navigation is down. I'm attempting a reboot.

speaker: shipAi
text: In the meantime, see if engines, targeting and tractoring are still functional.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, engines are operational. Tractor module is operational. Auto-targeting needs calibration.

speaker: shipAi
text: I managed to recover one skill point.

speaker: shipAi
text: Use it as you wish

speaker: shipAi
text: Navigation's still down. I'm working on it. Finish calibrating the tractor in the meantime.

speaker: shipAi
text: Tractor module auto-targeting is back online, Captain.

speaker: shipAi
text: Navigation is partially restored. I've located an outpost called Driftlight Station.

speaker: captain
text: Good. Can you set a course now?

speaker: shipAi
text: Negative. Manual input required. Tap the map icon on your panel, or press 'M' on your control pad.

speaker: greg
text: It's a good thing you ended up here, Captain.

speaker: greg
text: Others aren't so lucky. Some end up into the lower systems, pirate territory.

speaker: greg
text: Out there, it's join up or get scrapped for parts.

speaker: greg
text: And that working ECHO of yours? That'd light up every scanner in the sector.

speaker: greg
text: Another one, huh... I'm

speaker: captain
text: Captain

speaker: greg
text: The Great Gate? That's what they're calling it now?

speaker: greg
text: No,

speaker: greg
text: By the looks of your ship, I'm guessing you're here for repairs.

speaker: captain
text: It's not just the ship. My ECHO system took a beating too.

speaker: greg
text: An ECHO? You still have a working one?!

speaker: shipAi
text: Affirmative... However, my AI Core was damaged during the jump.

speaker: greg
text: That is quite rare... first things first: head over to your personal hangar to fix your ship a bit quicker. The auto-repairs will do the job, but it seems like you are in a hurry.

speaker: greg
text: While you're waiting for repairs... install this new turret. Yours isn't up to par. Once you're done, come talk to me again.

speaker: captain
text: Thanks. Any chance we could take a look at

speaker: greg
text: I could take a look, but I won't be much help. You'll need a engineer for that, and there aren't any around here.

speaker: greg
text: I do have an idea of where you might find one, but first, you'll need to return the favor.

speaker: captain
text: Alright, I'm sure we can manage. Well... I can manage.

speaker: greg
text: I'll even give this plasma cell and a jumpgate pass to get you to the next system.

speaker: greg
text: Oh, and also... you can use the armory (global) and material storage (local) to make room in your cargo hold.

speaker: captain
text: Haven't done this much manual work in years. With ECHO and all...

speaker: greg
text: Oh, very exhausting indeed... Sitting in the captain's chair, pushing buttons all day...

speaker: greg
text: Well, let's get you moving along with your journey.

speaker: greg
text: You should be familiar with the jumpgate system, it's the same as what we use back in our galaxy.

speaker: greg
text: Luckily, for us... a lot of colony ships ended up here carrying the gate constructors.

speaker: greg
text: So just jettison the pass at the gate to Orbitan, and it should unlock for you.

speaker: captain
text: Got it. Jettison the pass at the gate and head to Orbitan.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, I will remind you, just check the mission overview.

speaker: greg
text: Right, Once you're in the next system, head over to Point Station. They might be able to help you out. Good luck.

speaker: virgil
text: Howdy?

speaker: captain
text: Hey there, I'm looking for an ECHO engineer.

speaker: virgil
text: I see, ain't nobody of that caliber 'round here.

speaker: captain
text: Of course, ECHOs do seem pretty rare here...

speaker: virgil
text: Yeah... can't help you with that. I gotta go now. Bye.

speaker: captain
text: Uh, okay... that was... abrupt.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, I have located another station we should visit, but it is in the next system.

speaker: shipAi
text: We should run some missions from the Mission Board to purchase a pass to the next system.

speaker: shipAi
text: We can use the material (local) and armory (global) storage to help manage our items. You can access it through the inventory overview.

speaker: captain
text: In the sidepanel, I got it. Let's get to it.

speaker: character
text: I was part of The Second Wave, serving as a senior mechanic aboard the colony ship Orbitan of the 19th Expeditionary Fleet.

speaker: character
text: We were... I guess... just one of the unlucky ones, ending up here.

speaker: character
text: Time passed. More ships from other fleets started showing up..

speaker: character
text: Contracted captains, freelancers, outlaws... haven't seen a lot of major factions here, funnily enough.

speaker: character
text: Well, not all of them were friendly, but most were. If we wanted to survive, we had to work together.

speaker: character
text: And that's why I am helping you, so we can help eachother.

speaker: creed
text: Hey there...

speaker: captain
text: Hello. It's a long shot, but do you happen to have an ECHO engineer around here?

speaker: creed
text: Really? What for?

speaker: shipAi
text: My AI Core was damaged during the journey through the Great Gate.

speaker: creed
text: What?! They don't get damaged... they get destroyed!

speaker: creed
text: Elena, get over here.

speaker: elena
text: Creed? What's going on. Oh my...

speaker: elena
text: Let me see... hmm... yes... what... how...?

speaker: shipAi
text: Uh, could you... maybe stop?

speaker: elena
text: Sorry, this is just... very exciting.

speaker: captain
text: I guess... are you able to repair the core?

speaker: elena
text: Creed? Give them the nav coordinates.

speaker: creed
text: Yeah... we won't get this opportunity again.

speaker: creed
text: We just have to put our faith in you, stranger... Here you go.

speaker: creed
text: There's an old derelict corvette out there with a Damaged AI Core. Salvage it and bring it back here. We should be able to use that one to craft a new one.

speaker: captain
text: Got it, thank you.

speaker: elena
text: Wait! Captain, if you don't mind, I'd love to join your crew...

speaker: captain
text: Sure, I guess... We'll take all the help we can get.

speaker: elena
text: This is great! Finally, we might actually get out of here.

speaker: creed
text: Good, you're back. How did it go?

speaker: elena
text: Creed, we managed to salvage the damaged AI Core!

speaker: creed
text: That's excellent news! We still have the knowledge to craft AI Cores, just no working ECHOs to place them in... until now

speaker: creed
text: I've added the Industrial skill tree to your learning implant, it looks like you didn't have one before.

speaker: captain
text: I won't say no to that.

speaker: shipAi
text: Industrial skill tree has been activated, Captain.

speaker: creed
text: It's not necessary right now, but there are some useful upgrades in it if you have the skill points to spare.

speaker: creed
text: Head over to the forge, craft the AI Core, and come back to me as soon as you can.

speaker: captain
text: Got it. I'll head over there now.

speaker: creed
text: Alright, now...

speaker: creed
text: Captain, could you let

speaker: captain
text: Alright, sure... go ahead.

speaker: shipAi
text: Go ahead,

speaker: elena
text: Let's see...

speaker: elena
text: Yes, this is a perfect fit...

speaker: elena
text: Alright, done.

speaker: creed
text: Captain?

speaker: shipAi
text: Id fytz lyk a glob.

speaker: elena
text: Uh oh...

speaker: shipAi
text: Just kidding. Systems are stable. I've reallocated 4% of my processing power to humor.

speaker: creed
text: You gave me quite a scare there... Well, good job,

speaker: elena
text: Yes!!

speaker: creed
text: So, here's the deal, Captain...

speaker: creed
text: Your ECHO is the only one who can communicate with the constructor unit in the Hermetis system.

speaker: creed
text: It's the gate that connects this sector to the rest of the galaxy.

speaker: elena
text: So, once we repair the gate, we can finally leave this place!

speaker: creed
text: Yes,

speaker: creed
text: It's most likely being guarded by at least one pirate. They are trying to block us from entering that system. They are not in a rush to let us leave this sector...

speaker: creed
text: Once you take care of them, head back over here.

speaker: captain
text: Sounds good, thank you.

speaker: shipAi
text: Captain, I can now take over certain tasks. You can toggle me on or off in your sidepanel.

speaker: shipAi
text: It would also be helpful if you learn

speaker: shipAi
text: Go grab something to drink, read a book, whatever you want really. I can handle the more basic tasks, just not at maximum efficiency... yet.

speaker: creed
text: Welcome back, Captain.

speaker: creed
text: Knew you could handle it.

speaker: creed
text: Not much stands in our way now, just the gate repairs.

speaker: elena
text: Well, we still need the materials,

speaker: creed
text: Right, good point...

speaker: creed
text: You could mine or salvage the materials, but seeing as you are quite capable in combat...

speaker: creed
text: The pirates stole the materials we needed for the repairs

speaker: creed
text: They are quite formidable, so having a ship with a shield generator would help quite a bit.

speaker: creed
text: I'll give you the location of these pirate groups. Defeat them and we'll collect the materials they've stolen from us.

speaker: creed
text: We attuned your ship with the gate leading to Octantis, that's where the pirates are holding up. It should be unlocked now.

speaker: creed
text: Captain, it'd be a huge help if you could track down and craft what we need.

speaker: creed
text: Some of the raw stuff's more common in the lower systems.Take this gate pass from Octantis to Sparax.

speaker: captain
text: Understood. Let's put ECHO to work.

speaker: shipAi
text: Just give the order, Captain.

speaker: creed
text: Captain!

speaker: creed
text: Well, you dealt quite a blow to their presence, so you have my utmost thanks.

speaker: elena
text: It was very close,

speaker: creed
text: We already send someone to bring most of the materials to the gate.

speaker: creed
text: I will transfer the Signal Array to your cargo, only your ECHO can link this to the gate.

speaker: creed
text: Should be the last thing to do, and we can all get out of this sector.

speaker: creed
text: Give me the good news, Captain.

speaker: elena
text: We've repaired the gate!

speaker: creed
text: Or...

speaker: creed
text: You don't know how much you've helped us, thank you so much.

speaker: elena
text: I'd like to stay with the Captain permanently, if that's okay with you,

speaker: creed
text: Of course. You make a good team. Goodbye,

speaker: elena
text: Maybe we'll meet again. Goodbye,

speaker: creed
text: Captain, I've heard there are many possibilities waiting for you in this new galaxy.

speaker: creed
text: You might even make it all the way into Darkspace with your ECHO... if it's real. Anyway, good luck.

speaker: captain
text: Thanks, and good luck to you too,

speaker: character
text: Phew, that was a close call! Those pirates disabled our warp drive, they would've had us for lunch! Thanks for the help!

speaker: Characters.captain
text: No worries. Now, did I hear you mention anything about a reward...?

speaker: character
text: Err, yes, of course. Here you go.
